_comment: Deterministic CID examples for verification. Generated via SHA-256 of raw byte content.

examples.input: The fundamental science of matter, energy, and their interactions.

verification_note: Use `echo -n '<input>' | sha256sum` to verify on any POSIX system. CIDs in this file are illustrative examples — actual CIDs are computed at runtime by mycelium.chunking.compute_cid().
